name: SlInclude
description: PROPOSED contract extracted from extract/pilots/shoelace/custom-elements.json (components/include/include.js) (cem adapter) — API surface only; anatomy, tokens, and design bindings await reconciliation and human review.

props.name: src
props.description:
The location of the HTML file to include. Be sure you trust the content you are including as it will be executed as
code and can result in XSS attacks.

props.name: allow-scripts
props.description:
Allows included scripts to be executed. Be sure you trust the content you are including as it will be executed as
code and can result in XSS attacks.

props.name: allowScripts
props.description:
Allows included scripts to be executed. Be sure you trust the content you are including as it will be executed as
code and can result in XSS attacks.

events.name: load
events.description: Emitted when the included file is loaded. (CEM event "sl-load")

events.name: error
events.description: Emitted when the included file fails to load due to an error. (CEM event "sl-error")
